ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team (e.g., NYK, LAL) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the game */,
  "home_or_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game was played in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fg_attempts" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts by the player */,
  "fg_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "ft_attempts" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts by the player */,
  "ft_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "three_pt_attempts" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts by the player */,
  "three_pt_made" INTEGER /* Three-point shots made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the team */,
  "fg_attempts" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts by the team */,
  "fg_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the team */,
  "ft_attempts" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts by the team */,
  "ft_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the team */,
  "three_pt_attempts" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts by the team */,
  "three_pt_made" INTEGER /* Three-point shots made by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team administrator, coach, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
